pages.text: I live in a ravaged world. I can't escape them. I can't escape them... The dead pursue me, I have restless nights, visions, living and dying, again and again and again.$(p)And though Khaedyr has been broken so many times, people keep building. Before me lies destruction and strife.
I must endure, build, nurture, destroy, progress, kill, save. I have to keep moving, so I can attain... what, exactly?
